violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice Voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Ice machine to be cleaned and sanitized. Establishment to send photo of clean and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Cleaned and sanitized Cups were observed stored in the splash zone of the hand sink. Corrective Action - Cups were re washed rinsed and sanitized and moved to a new location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the (Kitchen). New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrective Action Establishment is to ask Waste Management company to move dumpster forward so Cover can be closed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2024
